description:
Response shape for `get_package_insert`.

On success: `error` is null and all payload fields are populated.
On failure: `error` is populated and payload fields are absent / default.

Citation requirement (per spec §14): every clinical claim returned in
`fields` is traceable via (source_url, retrieved_at, last_update_date,
field_sections[field_name]) — all four are present on success.

additional_sections.description: Sections that carry text but have no named field in the active format (e.g. OTC §7+, or a future TFDA addition). Each carries section_no + title + verbatim text — quote and cite directly. Replaces the older unmapped_sections safety net (which omitted the text).

items.description:
One insert section that carries text but has no named field in the active format.

Supersedes the older `unmapped_sections` safety net: it returns the section's
true `section_no` AND its verbatim `text`, so a section that this wrapper has
not given a field name (e.g. an OTC §7+ block, or a future TFDA addition) is
surfaced with its content intact rather than being silently dropped. Because
the raw text and true section number are returned, there is no risk of the LLM
fabricating a field mapping — quote `text` and cite `section_no` directly.

section_no.description: Section number as it appears in the FDA XML (e.g. '7', '16').

text.description: Verbatim plain-text content of this section.

title.description: Section title from the FDA XML (Traditional Chinese).

alternate_versions.description: Older insert versions returned alongside the newest (rare; usually empty).

items.description: One historical version of an insert (used in alternate_versions).

update_date.description: ISO date when this version was published, or null.

version.description: Version label from the FDA XML.

anyOf.description: Per-response attribution — distinguishes official data from third-party wrapper.

data_official.description: True iff `data_source` is a government/official body.

wrapper.description: Identity of the (third-party) MCP server returning this response.

attribution.description: Origin metadata — official data vs third-party wrapper.

available_sections.description: Table of contents — every populated section in the insert XML, with section number, title, char count, and the wrapper field name (or null if unmapped). Always returned regardless of which fields the caller requested. Lets LLM clients see what else is in this drug's insert without a second tool call; never assume `fields` is exhaustive.

items.description:
One entry in the `available_sections` table-of-contents.

Lists EVERY populated section in the insert XML — including ones the caller
did not request — so the LLM can see what else is available without fetching
again. `field_name` is the wrapper field that returns this section's content
(e.g. 'excipients' for §1.2), or None for tail sections this wrapper has not
named (whose text lives in `additional_sections`).

char_count.description: Length in characters of this section's plain-text content.

field_name.description: Wrapper field name that returns this section's content (e.g. 'excipients' for §1.2). None if not mapped to a named field.

section_no.description: Section number as in the FDA XML (e.g. '1.2', '6.5').

title.description: Section title from the FDA XML (Traditional Chinese).

cache_age_hours.description: Hours since the cached bytes were pulled from TFDA; null when from_cache is false. Reflects re-pull recency only, NOT clinical staleness (use last_update_date for that).

companies.description: 國內藥商 — from <COMPANY> XML repeats. Empty list if absent.

items.description: One <COMPANY> entry from the insert XML.

confirmed_absent.description: Field names whose source XML element exists but is empty — TFDA structurally confirms this drug has no such information. Distinguishes '查無 BBW' (tool failure) from 'TFDA 確認此藥無 BBW' (positive clinical fact). Currently populated for: special_warning, characteristics.

anyOf.description: Structured error block. `code` is the RCode name (string form, stable identifier).

message.description: Human-readable error message in Traditional Chinese or English.

field_sections.description: Map of clinical field-name → insert section number (e.g. 'contraindications': '4').

fields.description: Map of field-name → plain-text content. Keys are stable identifiers (see RX_FIELDS).

format.description: Insert format dispatched from <DTYPE>: 'rx' (prescription) or 'otc' (成藥/指示藥). Field names differ between formats — see fields docs.

from_cache.description: True iff this insert was served from the opt-in in-memory cache (ADR-0011) instead of freshly fetched. `retrieved_at` still reports the REAL TFDA fetch time, and `last_update_date` (the insert's own version date) is unaffected by caching — cite last_update_date as the clinical-currency signal, never cache_age_hours.

human_url.description: Human URL — official TFDA web page for this insert.

images.description: Inline insert images (e.g. 藥品外觀). Metadata always present; data_url (base64) only populated when response_format='full'.

items.description:
Metadata for one inline insert image (e.g. 藥品外觀).

`data_url` carries the base64 payload as a `data:` URI ONLY when the caller
requested `response_format="full"`; otherwise it is null so the LLM still
knows an image exists (and which section) without paying the token cost.

caption.description: Section title acting as the image caption.

section_no.description: Section number the image belongs to (e.g. '1.4').

insert_version.description: Version label from the FDA XML, or null.

last_update_date.description: ISO date of the insert's last TFDA update.

license_no.description: Echo of the license_no the caller passed.

main_factories.description: 主製造廠 — from <MAINFACTORY> XML repeats. Empty list if absent.

items.description: One <MAINFACTORY> / <SUBFACTORY> entry from the insert XML.

retrieved_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of this fetch.

source_url.description: Machine URL — TFDA GetDrugDoc API XML for this license (200 OK; cite as evidence).

sub_factories.description: 分裝/包裝廠 — from <SUBFACTORY> XML repeats. Empty list if absent.

items.description: One <MAINFACTORY> / <SUBFACTORY> entry from the insert XML.
One unknown field-name entry — annotated with closest valid match.

did_you_mean.description: Closest valid field name (via difflib), or null if none close enough.

input.description: The unrecognised field name the caller passed.

unknown_fields.description: Present iff the caller passed field names not in RX_FIELDS; each entry has did_you_mean.
